title: 工具执行成功: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/context.py (第 520 至 667 行，共 667 行) ---
 520 |             if keyword_lower in summary.summary_text.lower():
 521 |                 results.append(summary)
 522 |                 continue
 523 | 
 524 |             # 搜索任务目标
 525 |             if keyword_lower in summary.task_goal.lower():
 526 |                 results.append(summary)
 527 |                 continue
 528 | 
 529 |             # 搜索文件路径
 530 |             for file_change in summary.files_changed:
 531 |                 if keyword_lower in file_change.path.lower():
 532 |                     results.append(summary)
 533 |                     break
 534 | 
 535 |             # 搜索错误类型
 536 |             for error in summary.errors_encountered:
 537 |                 if keyword_lower in error.error_type.lower():
 538 |                     results.append(summary)
 539 |                     break
 540 | 
 541 |         return results
 542 | 
 543 |     def get_summary_statistics(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
 544 |         """
 545 |         获取摘要统计信息
 546 | 
 547 |         Returns:
 548 |             统计信息字典
 549 |         """
 550 |         if not self.session_summaries:
 551 |             return {
 552 |                 "total_summaries": 0,
 553 |                 "total_messages": 0,
 554 |                 "total_tokens": 0,
 555 |                 "avg_importance": 0.0
 556 |             }
 557 | 
 558 |         total_messages = sum(s.message_count for s in self.session_summaries)
 559 |         total_tokens = sum(s.token_count for s in self.session_summaries)
 560 |         avg_importance = sum(s.importance for s in self.session_summaries) / len(self.session_summaries)
 561 | 
 562 |         return {
 563 |             "total_summaries": len(self.session_summaries),
 564 |             "total_messages": total_messages,
 565 |             "total_tokens": total_tokens,
 566 |             "avg_importance": round(avg_importance, 2),
 567 |             "total_files_changed": sum(len(s.files_changed) for s in self.session_summaries),
 568 |             "total_errors": sum(len(s.errors_encountered) for s in self.session_summaries)
 569 |         }
 570 | 
 571 |     # ==================== Phase 2 新增方法 ====================
 572 | 
 573 |     def get_memory_statistics(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
 574 |         """
 575 |         获取三层记忆统计信息
 576 | 
 577 |         Returns:
 578 |             统计信息字典
 579 |         """
 580 |         if not self._enable_memory_layers:
 581 |             return self.get_summary_statistics()
 582 | 
 583 |         return self.memory_manager.get_statistics()
 584 | 
 585 |     def search_all_memories(self, query: str, top_k: int = 5) -> List[SessionSummary]:
 586 |         """
 587 |         在三层记忆中检索摘要
 588 | 
 589 |         Args:
 590 |             query: 查询关键词
 591 |             top_k: 返回结果数量
 592 | 
 593 |         Returns:
 594 |             匹配的摘要列表
 595 |         """
 596 |         if not self._enable_memory_layers:
 597 |             return self.search_summaries(query)[:top_k]
 598 | 
 599 |         return self.memory_manager.search(query, top_k)
 600 | 
 601 |     def get_recent_summaries_from_episodic(self, n: int = 5) -> List[SessionSummary]:
 602 |         """
 603 |         从情景记忆获取最近的摘要
 604 | 
 605 |         Args:
 606 |             n: 返回数量
 607 | 
 608 |         Returns:
 609 |             摘要列表
 610 |         """
 611 |         if not self._enable_memory_layers:
 612 |             return self.session_summaries[-n:] if n < len(self.session_summaries) else self.session_summaries
 613 | 
 614 |         return self.memory_manager.get_recent_summaries(n)
 615 | 
 616 |     def clear_all_memories(self):
 617 |         """清空所有三层记忆"""
 618 |         if self._enable_memory_layers:
 619 |             self.memory_manager.clear()
 620 | 
 621 |         # 兼容 Phase 1
 622 |         self.session_summaries.clear()
 623 |         self.history_summary = ""
 624 |         self.messages.clear()
 625 | 
 626 |         print("[Phase 2] 所有记忆已清空")
 627 | 
...
